creator: giffunip@tutopia.com
text:
The Latinamerican Keyboard was enhanced and renamed long ago, however sysinstall still looks for the old name.
I thought it might be something wrong in the way I update my installation but a fresh install in VirtualBox (FreeBSD guest only) had the same problem.

Fix: 

I normally rename the keyboard file but the correct fix must be in sysinstall.
How-To-Repeat: Running sysinstall and choosing
Configure --> Console --> Keymap --> Latin American*

returns "No appropiate keymap found"

The Spanish keyboard works fine.
